recent.title: What Is ONNX? (And Why Transformers.js Uses It)
recent.description: ONNX stores the model graph and weights in a portable format. ONNX Runtime decides how to execute them. WebGPU, WASM, or beyond. That separation is what lets Transformers.js run the same model across any device with a single JavaScript API.
